name: Date-Filled Drop Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. In a large bowl, cream shortening and brown sugar until light and fluffy. Add eggs; beat well. Stir in buttermilk and vanilla; blend thoroughly. Sift flour, salt, baking soda, and cinnamon together. Add to creamed mixture; beat well. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto greased cookie sheets, allowing 2 inches between drops. Place half a teaspoon of filling on the dough, then cover with another half teaspoon of dough. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until cookies are lightly browned and cooked through. Remove from oven and transfer to cooling racks.
Makes 5 to 6 dozen.
